About Organization

The Reserve Bank of India is the central bank of India, responsible for regulating the country's monetary policy.

The RBI plays a crucial role in maintaining the stability of the Indian economy.

About the Programme

The RBI Officer Grade B Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the position of Officer Grade B in the Reserve Bank of India.
